nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward De Broxburne was born in 1365, in Bradfield, Essex, England, his father, John de Broxbourne, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Welnethan, was 19. He had at least 1 daughter with Idonea Lavye. He died in 1434, in Essex, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward De Broxburne est né en 1365, à Bradfield, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John de Broxbourne, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Welnethan, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Idonea Lavye. Il est décédé en 1434, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward De Broxburne 1365 in Bradfield, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Broxbourne 28 und seine Mutter Margaret Welnethan 19. Er hatte mit Idonea Lavye mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1434 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward De Broxburne è nato il nel 1365 nel Bradfield, Essex, England, il suo padre, John de Broxbourne, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Welnethan, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Idonea Lavye. Morì nel 1434, nel Essex, England, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.Chippenham, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアチップエンハム
ja.Bradfield, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスブラドフィールド
ja.lifeSummary: Edward De Broxburneが1365年にイギリスエセックスブラドフィールドで生まれた時，父John de Broxbourneは28歳，母Margaret Welnethanは19歳であった。彼はIdonea Lavyeとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1434年にイギリスエセックスで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward De Broxburne(이)가 1365년 영국 에세스 브래드필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Broxbourne(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Welnethan(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Idonea Lavye(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1434년 영국 에세스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward De Broxburne nasceu em 1365, em Bradfield, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Broxbourne, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Welnethan, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Idonea Lavye. Ele faleceu em 1434, em Essex, Inglaterra, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward De Broxburne родился в 1365 г. в местности брадфиелд, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Broxbourne было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Welnethan, 19. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Idonea Lavye. Он умер в 1434 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward De Broxburne nació en 1365, en Bradfield, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Broxbourne, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Welnethan, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Idonea Lavye. Murió en 1434, en Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años.
